name: Validated form rejects an invalid amount

steps.text: Fill in the name "Jana", the email "jana@example.com", and an amount of "25", then submit the form.
Fill in the name "Jana", the email "jana@example.com", and an amount of "-5", then submit the form.

criteria.text: The valid submission (a positive whole-number amount with a valid name and email) is accepted: the form reports the request was received.
The submission with a negative amount of -5 is rejected as invalid and is NOT accepted, even though the name and email are valid.
